name: Christopher Knight Home Omry New Velvet Ottoman - Dark Teal: Upholstered Square Pouf, Hardwood Frame, 250lb Capacity
description: This mid century modern Christopher Knight Home Omry Ottoman is a great addition to any living room. This ottoman can double as a seat when the need arises, and is exceedingly comfortable, as both a seat and as an ottoman. Place this Christopher Knight Home Mid Century Modern Omry Ottoman anywhere in your home where you need extra seating or in front of your couch to put your feet on at the end of a long day.
